cards.title: Problem Formulation
cards.governance_note: Define inputs, outputs, objectives, constraints, assumptions, and success criteria before choosing a procedure.

cards.title: Correctness and Termination
cards.governance_note: Document correctness rationale, invariant, progress measure, stopping condition, and edge cases.

cards.title: Complexity and Context
cards.governance_note: Evaluate time, memory, interpretability, robustness, consequences, and governance readiness.
